name: American Ginseng Extract
summary: American Ginseng Extract is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Mitochondrial Health; Metabolic Health; Energy Metabolism. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Metabolic Regulation; Glucose Metabolism Support, not treatment claims.
description: American Ginseng Extract is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Mitochondrial Health; Metabolic Health; Energy Metabolism. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Metabolic Regulation; Glucose Metabolism Support, not treatment claims.
safetyNotes: Hypoglycemia possible; caution with antidiabetic drugs and anticoagulants.

claimMap.claim: v8.2: American ginseng extract has randomized evidence for reducing acute respiratory illness outcomes in older adults.
claimMap.notes: v8.2: American ginseng extract has randomized evidence for reducing acute respiratory illness outcomes in older adults.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: product-specific standardized Panax quinquefolius extract; use studied extract dose

sources.title: PubMed PMID 16332936. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
sources.citation: PubMed PMID 16332936. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
sources.note: evidence citation lookup; PMID source present in Evidence_Register

contraindications: known hypersensitivity to ginseng or other Araliaceae family plants
warfarin due to documented case reports of reduced drug effectiveness and lowered INR requiring closer monitoring
diabetes medication or insulin due to added hypoglycemia risk
phenelzine or other monoamine oxidase inhibitor medications due to a reported adverse interaction
uncontrolled high blood pressure or acute infection or excessive menstrual bleeding per traditional contraindication use
